settings.title: Brands
settings.note: Covers the brand listing page and individual brand pages (prefixed brand-). Templates have been pre-built — content still needs a review before launch.
settings.tasks:
Review all pre-built brand page templates before launch
Verify existing brand meta-object entries are fully populated (name, alphabet letter, categories, brand image, men's + women's collections, page reference)
For each new brand: duplicate an existing brand page template in the customiser (keep the 'brand-' naming convention)
Create the new page in Online Store → Pages and assign the new template
Add a meta-object entry under 'brand' and reference the new page so it appears on the brands listing

settings.title: Magazine / Blog Posts
settings.note: All blog posts have been migrated from Sanity into Shopify blog post templates. Workflow for publishing new posts is unchanged from the live theme — just styled to match the staging design.
settings.action_links:
Open article template (customiser) | https://admin.shopify.com/store/trendy-golf-uk/themes/188411871618/editor?template=article.adidas-rolling-links
Blog posts | https://admin.shopify.com/store/trendy-golf-uk/articles
Blogs | https://admin.shopify.com/store/trendy-golf-uk/blogs
settings.tasks:
Review each migrated blog post renders correctly (article template, hero carousel, content blocks, banner cards, feature collection)
Update 'Shop the Look' sections — several reference products that no longer exist on the live site
Verify tags (brand, clothing, etc.) carried across correctly from the live theme
Confirm the existing blog author can continue publishing using the same workflow

settings.title: Main Menu / Mega Menu
settings.note: Using 'Main Menu 2.0' — duplicated from the live site's main menu with Magazine and Shoe Finder added. Mega menu images are matched to parent nav items by title.
settings.tasks:
Review Main Menu 2.0 items and nested structure against the live site
Decide whether the 'Launches' menu item from the staging site should carry through (separate conversation needed)
Review each mega menu image block — the block title must exactly match the parent nav item title for the image to appear
Add headings and links to mega menu images where missing (currently several have no heading / link)

settings.title: Shoe Finder
settings.note: Shoe Finder quiz filters a results collection by tag, based on quiz answers. A smart collection can't do OR-across-tags, so the results collection MUST be a manual collection.
settings.tasks:
Create a manual collection (e.g. 'Shoe Finder Results') and add every product that can appear as a quiz result
Assign that collection to the Shoe Finder section → 'Results collection' setting
Sanity-check product tags (men, women, cleated, spikeless, classic, modern) — they were carried from Sanity and should already be correct
For each candidate product, ensure the transparent-background PNG metafield is populated (Google Drive URL) so product cards render without a background
Add missing images to quiz answer blocks (Q2 spiked / spikeless currently has no images)

settings.heading: To Do's
settings.intro: Walk through each Loom, then tick off the tasks below. Ticks are saved in this browser via localStorage — switch browsers or clear site data and progress resets.
